## [v1.0.0-RC](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/compare/v0.1.2...v1.0.0-RC "2023-09-25") - 25 September 2023

### :tada: New Features

- 增加 v-height-adaptive 指令 (#13) [`91ff939`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/91ff9391550c3daed236617bd994a2f21400bf95) by @Lruihao

- **Sticky-footer**: 增加 v-sticky-footer 指令 [`9c87783`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/9c877830addb6f08553af49b17158c8e54459b9d) by @Lruihao

### :bug: Bug Fixes

- **Height-adaptive**: 修复 v-height-adaptive resize 事件监听失效 [`e4036b4`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/e4036b44f67ade00cd97da39736fd1a686b50d2c) by @Lruihao
- 修复当禁用原生滚动条后，gemini-scrollbar 计算滑块偏移量出现偏差的问题 (#4) [`5c80091`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/5c80091e21841fdb78264cde52ab1588b7991e02) by @Lruihao
- 修复没有横向滚动条的时候 sticky 错误 [`7446554`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/74465549e3a794c313af072a80fd438e07eaafef) by @Lruihao
- 修复打包后，new.target.name 变化导致的 bug [`eae9fe3`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/eae9fe3c17e5d0ebc80bbe96a429582964e38285) by @Lruihao

### :zap: Performance Improvements

- 使用继承减少重复代码 [`e8369f3`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/e8369f36c63911b08b0a75e737a6904052f0aaf2) by @Lruihao

- **Sticky-header**: 优化 v-sticky-header 指令，参数改为通过指令传递 [`aabb1ee`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/aabb1ee174e3a7f4b4c16237f1da88818f0c9e17) by @Lruihao
- 拆分函数增加可读性 [`8cc8500`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/8cc8500289730113c02e775f7255491e52fd0e3d) by @Lruihao
- 增加表格宽度观察器，宽度变化更新滚动条 [`f5f0b3a`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/f5f0b3aff7d90ec88e7134e212d17ad6c4cabe0c) by @Lruihao

- 使用可选链语法优化代码 [`1e3a5d0`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/1e3a5d06ec4d609aed95aa710eb62b50d6f20798) by @Lruihao

## v0.1.1 - 2023-06-18

### :twisted_rightwards_arrows: Merged PRs

> This release includes **2** merged pull requests that have been successfully integrated into the codebase.

- **Stick-header**: 修复当 el-table 添加 border 属性时，顶部 border 丢失的 BUG by @Lruihao in #2
- **Sticky-header**: 修复表格列动态改变时，columns sticky 堆叠失效的问题 by @Lruihao in #1

### :heavy_check_mark: Closed Issues

> This release addresses **2** issues that have been resolved and closed.

- **Stick-header**: 修复当 el-table 添加 border 属性时，顶部 border 丢失的 BUG (#2) #2 by @Lruihao
- **Sticky-header**: 修复表格列动态改变时，columns sticky 堆叠失效的问题 (#1) #1 by @Lruihao

---

### :tada: New Features

- Element-ui 项目初始化，自动配置路由 [`2199594`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/21995942ec9df4855a48048de7ffe492d2899cda) by @Lruihao
- 调整 demo 总体布局 [`c3cfe0a`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/c3cfe0aca95a43ee65a04c6637826ca2eef6aac7) by @Lruihao
- 增加 v-sticky-header 指令代码 [`1ed3add`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/1ed3addf876a38aafafbfca349ee1a7a554ae760) by @Lruihao

### :bug: Bug Fixes

- **Stick-header**: 修复当 el-table 添加 border 属性时，顶部 border 丢失的 BUG (#2) [`b4bf74d`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/b4bf74dd1f383eec9857fc8d60eff2ebf44ae55b) by @Lruihao
- **Sticky-header**: 修复表格列动态改变时，columns sticky 堆叠失效的问题 (#1) [`ec03e8d`](https://github.com/Lruihao/el-table-sticky/commit/ec03e8db61ef55d4b43e14b0b3456cd6ad39688c) by @Lruihao
